personas.name: Patient
personas.short_description: Manages medical records, views care timeline, schedules appointments, receives reminders and plain-language health explanations.
key_responsibilities: Ingest and extract structured data from medical documents via OCR/AI
Build longitudinal patient timelines from prescriptions, tests, consultations, and treatments
Schedule appointments based on doctor availability and urgency
Send personalized reminders for medications, vaccinations, tests, and follow-ups
Provide multilingual plain-language explanations of prescriptions and medical terms
Generate personalized treatment journey dashboard for patients

personas.name: Doctor
personas.short_description: Reviews AI-summarized patient history with source traceability before consultations; detects care gaps and conflict risks.
key_responsibilities: Detect duplicate medications, conflicting prescriptions, and missed follow-ups
Recommend appropriate specialists based on symptoms and medical history
Deliver AI-summarized patient history with source traceability to doctors

personas.name: Hospital Administrator
personas.short_description: Tracks hospital-wide operational efficiency, compliance rates, appointment bottlenecks, and patient care timeline metrics.
key_responsibilities: Analyze hospital-wide metrics on compliance, bottlenecks, and care timelines
Detect duplicate medications, conflicting prescriptions, and missed follow-ups
Send personalized reminders for medications, vaccinations, tests, and follow-ups
